sn22.48:1.1: Near Sāvatthī. There the Blessed One said,
sn22.48:1.2: “Monks, I will teach you the five aggregates & the five clinging-aggregates.
sn22.48:1.3: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.” “As you say, lord,” the monks responded to him. The Blessed One said,
sn22.48:1.4: “Now what, monks, are the five aggregates?
sn22.48:1.5: Any form whatsoever that is past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near: That is called the form aggregate.
sn22.48:1.6: Any feeling whatsoever that is past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near: That is called the feeling aggregate.
sn22.48:1.7: Any perception whatsoever that is past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near: That is called the perception aggregate.
sn22.48:1.8: Any fabrications whatsoever that are past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near: Those are called the fabrication aggregate.
sn22.48:1.9: Any consciousness whatsoever that is past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near: That is called the consciousness aggregate.
sn22.48:1.10: These are called the five aggregates.
sn22.48:2.1: And what are the five clinging-aggregates?
sn22.48:2.2: Any form whatsoever—past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near—that is clingable, offers sustenance, and is accompanied with effluents: That is called the form clinging-aggregate.
sn22.48:2.3: Any feeling whatsoever—past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near—that is clingable, offers sustenance, and is accompanied with effluents: That is called the feeling clinging-aggregate.
sn22.48:2.4: Any perception whatsoever—past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near—that is clingable, offers sustenance, and is accompanied with effluents: That is called the perception clinging-aggregate.
sn22.48:2.5: Any fabrications whatsoever—past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near—that are clingable, offer sustenance, and are accompanied with effluents: Those are called the fabrication clinging-aggregate.
sn22.48:2.6: Any consciousness whatsoever—past, future, or present; internal or external; blatant or subtle; common or sublime; far or near—that is clingable, offers sustenance, and is accompanied with effluents: That is called the consciousness clinging-aggregate.
sn22.48:2.7: These are called the five clinging-aggregates.”
